title: teams — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for roster mutation routes. Off = every POST/PATCH /teams/{team}/members returns 503 with a maintenance banner. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of the team_members table).
Off = trial:convert action is refused (503). Trials can still be scheduled/completed/rejected but cannot become TeamMember rows. Emergency-only for atomic-conversion race investigations.
Off = AgeEligibilityGate always allows. Used during data-quality investigations when athlete DOBs are being cleaned.
Off = GenderEligibilityGate always allows. Rarely used.
Off = ReconcileTeamMemberActiveInvariantJob skips. Only flip off for maintenance windows.
Off = NotifyTrialistPreTrialJob no-ops. Used when notifications module is unstable to avoid backing up its queue.
Off = OpenClosePendingRegistrationsJob skips. Registration windows must be flipped manually by admins.
Off = TeamCoachChanged with is_minor_only=true does NOT fire the safeguarding-lead notification. TESTING-ONLY toggle; production must stay on.
